basics.name: Victor S. Nunes
basics.label: Quantitative Developer
basics.summary: Cross-disciplinary professional with experience in Software Development, Data Science & Analysis, and Quantitative Finance. I am currently working with Quantitative Develop.

work.name: XP Inc
work.summary: XP Inc is one of the largest financial companies in Brazil (listed on NASDAQ). I working with Quantitative Developers to improve and develop operations’ systems and the Treasury’s backbone to sustain a growing workspace for new products.

work.name: XP Inc
work.summary: XP Inc is one of the largest financial companies in Brazil (listed on NASDAQ). I worked with the AMS (Asset Management Services) team, focusing on Closed-End Funds, collecting data, and developing reports and dashboards to measure the Performance of the distribution of funds area. As well as developing analyses to enhance the performance of this area.
highlights: I developed a tool for matching trades that, still in the testing phase, helped to raise BRL 6 million and now helps the trading desk to capture several million per month.

By analyzing the income statement and data from a specific product, we discovered why the product had a negative EBITDA. Additionally, we modeled the product and simulated scenarios to find ways to improve the EBITDA. As a result, we will reduce our losses by approximately 70%.

I spearheaded the development of a tool to calculate revenue from the performance fee of the funds we distribute and manage. This information is very critical, and we didn't have it in an automated and fast way. With this tool, we can have this data periodically, and with that, we can make strategic decisions.

work.name: Inventione
work.summary: Inventione is a startup whose main product is the FilaZero app, which aims to implement virtual queues and optimize service in hospitals, receptions, events, etc.
highlights: Development of a NodeJS API for integration of 2 systems to expand the operation of both companies
Development and maintenance of software using different languages and frameworks to improve the performance of two company products: Filazero App and Cloudmidia.

volunteer.organization: Colégio Estadual (Centro de Excelência) Barão de Mauá
volunteer.summary: Teaching: Mechanics, Wave Phenomena, Optics and Electromagnetism.

courses: Final Work: Reconstruction of the Cosmic Expansion Using Gaussian Processes.
Undergraduate Research Project in Mathematics, Mathematical Physics and Theoretical Physics (Differential Geometry and General Relativity)
Teacher Assistant in Mathematical Physics (PDE, Complex Analysis and Vector Analysis)
Electronics and Computing Subsystem Member of Serbaja Competition Team (DMEC-UFS)

projects.name: Quantum Computing
projects.summary: Quantum computing is the use of quantum-mechanical phenomena such as superposition and entanglement to perform computation. Computers that perform quantum computations are known as quantum computers.
